name: binutils-mingw-w64-base
title: binutils-mingw-w64-base
summary: Cross-binutils for Win32 and Win64 using MinGW-w64 (base package)
description:
Cross-binutils for Win32 and Win64 using MinGW-w64 (base package)
MinGW-w64 provides a development and runtime environment for 32- and
64-bit (x86 and x64) Windows applications using the Windows API and
the GNU Compiler Collection (gcc).
.
This package contains files common to all binutils-mingw-w64 packages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use binutils-mingw-w64-base because Cross-binutils for Win32 and Win64 using MinGW-w64 (base package).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use binutils-mingw-w64-base as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair binutils-mingw-w64-base with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `binutils-mingw-w64-base --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
